rationale: Educ. Code §13.285 governs the funding source for incentive aid payments from the foundation school fund. It does not reference Tax Code §11.13(b) or homestead exemption amounts, so no conflict arises.
quote: The cost of incentive aid payments authorized by this subchapter shall be paid from the foundation school fund.
_note: No direct or indirect conflict identified. Rule is silent on homestead exemption levels.
